expectations.text: Design options (Option A, Option B, etc.) are presented with pros and cons
expectations.evidence: Step 3 presents 3 options (A: Abstraction Layer First, B: Direct Swap, C: ORM Adoption) each with Pros and Cons sections.

expectations.text: User is asked to choose an approach before plan is written
expectations.evidence: Step 3 ends with 'Which approach would you prefer?' and 'WAITS for user to select an approach. Does not proceed until choice is made.'

expectations.text: Questions are asked to resolve unknowns rather than assuming
expectations.evidence: Step 2 asks 3 questions: target deployment environment, acceptable downtime window, and SQLite-specific features in use.

expectations.text: Plan includes migration and rollback considerations (Be Practical philosophy)
expectations.evidence: Plan includes 'Phase 5: Data Migration Tooling' with scripts and validation, plus a 'Rollback Plan' section with 'Set DB_TYPE=sqlite in environment to instantly switch back.'
